channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Six Flags to sell 7 amusement parks in deal worth more than $330M  Fox Business
  3. Six Flags sells off Worlds of Fun, Six Flags St. Louis | Here's what that means for the 2026 season  KMBC
  4. Valleyfair among 7 amusement parks sold by Six Flags  5 EYEWITNESS NEWS
  5. Six Flags announces that it is selling Worlds of Fun  KCTV

item.title: U.S. manufacturers are still shedding thousands of jobs, as workers ask White House for help - CBS News
item.description:
1. U.S. manufacturers are still shedding thousands of jobs, as workers ask White House for help  CBS News
  2. Rep. Hinson speaks on Iran conflict, Amana Whirlpool layoffs  KCRG
  3. Photo Gallery: Iowa State Auditor Rob Sand speaks with workers and union leaders in Amana  thegazette.com
  4. Whirlpool CEO Responds to Letter from Miller-Meeks, Hinson on Amana Layoffs  Representative Mariannette Miller-Meeks | (.gov)
  5. Iowa saw 481 layoffs announced in February. Most were from Whirlpool  The Des Moines Register
